---
title: "p1_analytics.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/p1_analytics.ts"
loc: 59
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.13
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 4.11
overall_score: 4.88
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [getDb](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [*](file://chalk)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `runAnalytics`
- `db`
- `spokes`
- `hotspots`
- `loops`
- `ratio`
